strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: Your MTD CPL of ₹460 is an improvement, but at 50% pacing, you're not utilizing your budget effectively. Optimize your audience targeting and scale your efforts quickly to avoid stagnation and capitalize on potential conversions.

active_playbooks.title: CPM Cost Increases — Auction & Creative Fix
actions: Refresh first 3 seconds of videos (movement, emotion, contrast)
Add fresh UGC-style creatives (native looking, not ad-like)
Use brighter non-Facebook colors (yellow, red, orange vs blue/grey)
Pause underperforming ads (CPM up + CTR down)
Split-test placement (exclude Audience Network if CTR < 0.5%)

active_playbooks.title: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
diagnosis: Check video size/aspect ratio mismatch (cropped on feed?)
Compare thumb-stop by audience and placement
actions: Add motion within first 1 second (pan, zoom, text slide-in)
Use face or eyes (human presence increases scroll-stops)
Add headline overlays on first frame ('3BHK | ₹1.35Cr | Ready 2025')
Use pattern interrupts (camera shakes, cuts, quick zooms)
Test UGC hooks ('POV: You finally find a 3BHK with 3 balconies')
Try native feel (looks like a reel, not an ad)

recommendations.category: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix

recommendations.detail: Video ads with TSR < 25%: Old-Lady-Testimonial-Vide. Add motion at 0-1s, use face/eyes, headline overlay, pattern interrupts.
Score: 65.0/100, CPL: ₹143 (within target), 13 leads. SOP: Scale max 25%.
